selection.status_reason: Live thesis monitor refreshed the active weekly pick.

reasons: Price trend remains constructive: 5-day momentum is 14.0% and 20-day momentum is 25.7%.
Trend quality is supported by 70% positive sessions over the last 10 trading days and the price sitting 14.2% relative to its 20-day average.
Risk profile shows daily volatility around 2.4%, downside volatility near 0.8%, and a recent max drawdown of 2.7%.
Volume confirmation is 27.4% versus the trailing baseline, which helps separate steady breakouts from thin momentum.
Relative strength is 10.8% versus SPY over 5 days and 11.9% versus the sector ETF.
News signal is neutral with score 0.54, confidence 0.63, and 0.2 weighted articles across 3 sources.
GPT-5 article classification and company-news provider coverage rated the news flow neutral at 0.54, after adjusting for relevance, recency, source quality, and story concentration.
Evidence quality: 3 articles across 3 sources, 0.2 effective weighted articles, average relevance 0.59, average source quality 0.84, confidence 0.63.
Technical weights were calibrated on 2303 historical symbol-weeks against 5-day excess return (IC -0.03).
Overall model score is 0.172 with medium confidence.

news_evidence.title: US-Iran Peace Framework Nears as Trump Signals Sanctions Relief; Google Offers EU Concessions
news_evidence.llm_reason: Headline explicitly references Google offering concessions to the EU — a development that could materially reduce near-term regulatory risk and affect investor sentiment for Alphabet over the next few trading days. Geopolitical mention (US-Iran) is noise for Alphabet, so impact is positive but modest given limited detail.
